info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing the ecommerce platform's build time processes, including deployment and setup tasks.

tags.name: build
tags.description: Operations related to building and deploying the ecommerce application.

tags.name: setup
tags.description: Endpoints for setup and initialization tasks of the ecommerce platform.

post.description: Creates a new user account by accepting user details in the request body. On success, returns the created user information.

example.message: Provided user data is invalid or incomplete.
A user with the given email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Initiates a new order placement for the specified user identified by userId. Returns the details of the placed order.

example.message: Order request contains invalid or missing data.

details.issue: userId path parameter is missing or malformed

example.message: User with the specified userId does not exist.

details.issue: No user found with given userId

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve order details by order ID
get.description: Fetches detailed information about a specific order identified by the orderId path parameter.

example.message: The orderId provided is not valid.
No order found with the specified orderId.

details.issue: No order exists for this ID

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds the specified item to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. The request body must specify the item details.

requestBody.description: Details of the cart item to add

example.message: The cart item information provided is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the user's shopping cart contents
get.description: Fetches the current items and details in the shopping cart of the specified user identified by userId.

example.message: The userId path parameter is invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of a specific order
get.description: Retrieve tracking information for the order identified by orderId. Returns the current shipping status and relevant delivery updates.

404.description: Order or tracking information not found

example.message: No tracking information found for the specified order ID.

details.issue: The specified order ID does not exist.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create a new product entry by providing product details such as name, description, price, and stock information. Returns the created product details.

requestBody.description: Product details to add to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

example.message: Product data validation failed due to incorrect or missing fields.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number.

409.description: Product with the same identifier already exists

example.message: A product with the given identifier already exists in the catalog.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive payment status updates via webhook
post.description: Endpoint to receive asynchronous payment event notifications from payment providers. Processes the payment event data and updates internal payment status.

requestBody.description: Payload representing the payment event data sent by the payment gateway

example.message: The webhook payload is invalid or missing required fields.

details.issue: Field is required and must be a string.

example.message: Payment processing failed due to insufficient funds or authorization.

details.issue: Payment was declined by the payment provider.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment process by submitting payment details such as amount, currency, and payment method. Returns processing result and payment transaction details.

requestBody.description: Details for the payment to be initiated

example.message: The payment details provided are invalid or incomplete.
Payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or authorization failure.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

transactionId.description: Identifier of the transaction in the payment gateway

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order before discounts

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Final amount payable after applying discounts

paymentStatus.description: Current status of the payment for the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

userType.description: Type or role of the user

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user information was last updated

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI and long battery life.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of units available in stock

quantity.description: Number of units ordered for the product

price.description: Original price per unit of the product before discount

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last tracking update

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the shipment

status.description: Current delivery status of the order

trackingId.description: Tracking number assigned by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total amount for all items before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Total discount amount applied on the cart

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the cart

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

amount.description: Total amount to be paid in the specified currency

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with this payment

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment (e.g., credit_card, paypal, bank_transfer)

currency.description: Currency code in ISO 4217 format for the payment amount

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway processing this payment

country.description: Country of residence of the user

phone.description: User's contact phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: The currency preferred by the user for transactions

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

userType.description: Type or role of the user within the system

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

orderId.description: Order ID associated with this payment

currency.description: Currency code used for the payment

transactionId.description: Identifier for the transaction provided by the payment gateway

status.description: Current status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

price.description: Price of the product in the specified currency

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

path.description: Request path that caused the error

details.description: Detailed list of issues related to the error
